Services | Doctors | Contact

About Our Clinic

LifeCare Family Medical Center was founded in 2024 with the mission of providing affordable and quality healthcare to families.

Our clinic started as a small healthcare unit and became one of the trusted medical centers in the city because of our commitment to patient care and professional treatment.

We believe in patient safety and satisfaction by using modern medical technology and experienced healthcare staff.

Founder Information: Muhammad Junaid Qazi - BC190409022

Our Healthcare Services

We provide advanced healthcare facilities including digital X-rays, laboratory testing, emergency treatment, pharmacy services, and child healthcare support.

Our clinic focuses on quick diagnosis and reliable treatment for all patients.

Student ID:BC190409022

Our Doctors

Our medical team consists of experienced doctors and specialists who are dedicated to patient care and modern healthcare services.

Every doctor at our clinic has years of experience in treatment, diagnosis, and patient consultation.

Designed By: Muhammad Junaid Qazi

   

Clinic Services

  • X-Ray Facility
  • Blood Testing Laboratory
  • 24/7 Emergency Care
  • Pharmacy Services

Steps for Booking Appointment

  1. Visit our clinic reception or official website
  2. Fill out the patient appointment form
  3. Select your preferred doctor
  4. Confirm your appointment schedule
